population: x402 Bazaar payment agents (real, external) — every record accepts USDC on Base
method: static flag scan of each agent's public record + resource URL (onyx-security-flags/v0). Facts, not verdicts: each flag is an observed condition. Deterministic — recompute from the same dataset and you get these exact counts.

no_permission_scope.means: record carries no permission/scope fields — nothing states what the agent is allowed to do

no_verifiable_signature.means: no signing key / signature in the record — you cannot cryptographically confirm who controls it

insecure_transport.means: resource endpoint not served over https

transacts_without_verify.means: accepts payment but record shows no counterparty-verification step

honesty: This is the EXTERNAL agent economy (x402 Bazaar), not 0n1x's own census. It is exactly why verify-before-you-pay exists: real agents move real money with no scope, no signature, no counterparty check. 0n1x is the layer that adds them back.
recompute: Run onyx-security-flags/v0 (tools_pkg/onyx_security_flags._flags) over each record with endpoint=record.resource. Aggregate the flags. Counts above are deterministic.
